title: turnera fissifolia
intro: Turnera fissifolia, also known as Mayan chamomile or Mexican chamomile, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Turnera fissifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Turnera fissifolia can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
